title: Kia India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Kia India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Quality Control Engineer with drive and ambition, Kia India in Pune is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Kia India:
Kia India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kia India!
